text: The great racing driver, Sir Malcolm Campbell, was the first man to drive at over 300 miles per hour.
zh: [1] 伟大的赛车手马尔科姆·坎贝尔爵士是第一个驾车速度超过每小时300英里的人。

text: He set up a new world record in September 1935 at Bonneville Salt Flats, Utah.
zh: [2] 1935年9月,他在美国犹他州的邦纳维尔盐滩创造了新的世界纪录。

text: Bluebird, the car he was driving, had been specially built for him.
zh: [3] 他驾驶的“蓝鸟号”是专门为他打造的赛车。

text: It was over 30 feet in length and had a 2, 500-horsepower engine.
zh: [4] 这辆车长超过30英尺,配备了2500马力的发动机。

text: Although Campbell reached a speed of over 304 miles per hour,
zh: [5] 尽管坎贝尔达到了每小时超过304英里的速度,

text: he had great difficulty in controlling the car because a tyre burst during the first run.
zh: [6] 但由于第一轮行驶中轮胎爆裂,他很难控制住车辆。

text: After his attempt, Campbell was disappointed to learn that his average speed had been 299 miles per hour.
zh: [7] 比赛结束后,坎贝尔得知自己的平均时速为299英里,感到十分失望。

text: However, a few days later, he was told that a mistake had been made.
zh: [8] 然而几天后,他被告知之前算错了。

text: His average speed had been 301 miles per hour.
zh: [9] 他的平均时速其实是301英里。

text: Since that time, racing drivers have reached speeds over 600 miles an hour.
zh: [10] 从那时起,赛车手们已经达到了超过每小时600英里的速度。

text: Following in his father's footsteps many years later, Sir Malcolm's son, Donald, also set up a world record.
zh: [11] many年后,马尔科姆爵士的儿子唐纳德继承父业,也创造了一项世界纪录。

text: Like his father, he was driving a car called Bluebird.
zh: [12] 和他父亲一样,他驾驶的也是一辆名为“蓝鸟号”的赛车。
